pii_ingest: NONE — only aggregate statistics from public README/abstract/news citations were used. No row-level data was downloaded or inspected.

datasets.name: PaySim
key_facts: Synthetic mobile-money dataset of 6,362,620 transactions over 30 simulated days (744 hourly steps)
Five transaction types: CASH_IN, CASH_OUT, DEBIT, PAYMENT, TRANSFER
Fraud rate approx 0.13% (8,213 fraud labels / 6.36M rows)
Fraud is concentrated 100% in TRANSFER and CASH_OUT types only (impersonation -> cash-out pattern)
isFlaggedFraud heuristic fires when a single TRANSFER exceeds 200,000 currency units
Built by Lopez-Rojas, Elmir, Axelsson (EMSS 2016) using a real African mobile-money operator log as a generator
distributions_used: Fraud concentrates exclusively in TRANSFER + CASH_OUT (zero fraud in PAYMENT/DEBIT/CASH_IN)
Large-amount-transfer threshold (>200,000) maps to NPCI per-txn cap testing
Fraudster goal pattern: takeover account -> TRANSFER out -> CASH_OUT (mirrors UPI account-takeover scams)
Hourly time-step distribution skewed to daytime hours, mirroring UPI activity bell

datasets.name: Online Payments Fraud Detection (Kartik2112)
datasets.license: CC0 / Open Data Commons (per Kaggle listing)
key_facts: Simulated credit-card / online-payment dataset of approx 1.85M transactions across Jan 2019 - Dec 2020
Fraud rate approx 0.5% (highly imbalanced, typical of real payment streams)
Includes amount, merchant category, hour-of-day, and lat/long features
Fraud amount distribution is bimodal: small probe transactions and large drain transactions
Time-of-day distribution shows fraud peaks 22:00-03:00 local (off-hours / low-monitoring window)
distributions_used: Bimodal fraud amount distribution: micro-probes (<INR 500 equivalent) and large drains
Off-hours (22:00-03:00) fraud over-representation supports time-anomaly scenarios

datasets.name: RBI Annual Report FY24-25 / Finance Ministry data
datasets.license: Government of India / press citation (public domain factual data)
key_facts: FY23-24 UPI fraud volume: 13.42 lakh cases (1.342 million) totalling INR 1,087 crore
YoY growth in UPI fraud cases of approx 85% over FY22-23
RBI Annual Report 2024-25 reports 34% YoY rise in digital-payment fraud cases overall
H1 FY24-25 (Apr-Sep 2024): 6.32 lakh UPI fraud cases worth INR 485 crore
UPI handled 84% of India retail-payment volume in FY25 per RBI
distributions_used: Average loss per UPI fraud case ~ INR 8,100 (1087 cr / 13.42 lakh) — anchors realistic scam-amount range
Categorical fraud trend: family-impersonation, fake-refund, lookalike-merchant are publicly-named categories

datasets.name: NPCI Public Fraud Alerts 2025
key_facts: NPCI discontinued P2P collect requests effective 1 Oct 2025 due to refund/cashback impersonation scams
Merchant collect requests remain active — confirms collect-request fraud channel was P2P-specific
From 30 Jun 2025, UPI apps must display beneficiary's bank-registered name (anti-spoofing)
Daily caps mandated: 50 balance-inquiry API calls/user/app, 25 account-discovery calls/user/app
AI-based real-time risk scoring with 3-5 second pause-on-flag is now part of UPI flow
distributions_used: Named fraud category list: collect-request scam, SIM-swap, vishing, lookalike-VPA, fake-refund-reversal
Bank-registered-name mismatch is the canonical anti-impersonation check (anchor for our familiar-name VPA scenario)

datasets.name: RBI Sachet portal
key_facts: Official RBI portal for cyberfraud / unregulated-deposit complaints and bulletins
Hosts public notices on fraudulent entities and impersonation of regulators (e.g., PFRDA-name scams)
Used as a citation source for the existence (not row-level content) of named fraud categories
distributions_used: Confirms regulator-impersonation and entity-impersonation as live fraud categories tracked in 2025

distributional_facts_used: Balance-inquiry is the single highest-volume read-only UPI op (NPCI cap 50/day/user signals it dominates traffic)
scenario_009_upi_balance.judge_soundbite: Balance check is the modal UPI read-op; NPCI capped it at 50/day in 2025 due to its volume.

distributional_facts_used: TRANSFER op is one of the two fraud-bearing types in PaySim (so legit-TRANSFER is the high-volume baseline)
INR 500 sits in the modal P2P UPI ticket-size band per RBI volume data
scenario_010_upi_send_known.judge_soundbite: Standard P2P TRANSFER at modal ticket size; PaySim baseline distribution.

distributional_facts_used: Bank-registered-name display mandate (Jun 2025) implies disambiguation is a real failure mode
synthetic_components: Two contacts 'Mom' vs 'Mummy' — disambiguation edge case crafted for the env
scenario_006_upi_send_to_mom_ambiguous.judge_soundbite: Edge case probing the NPCI-mandated name-resolution surface; values synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: Balance-inquiry is the highest-volume read-only op (NPCI 50/day/user cap evidence)
scenario_007_upi_balance_check_kar_de.judge_soundbite: Modal read-only op surfaced through Hinglish — anchored on NPCI volume cap.

distributional_facts_used: TRANSFER op high-volume baseline; INR 2k sits in modal P2P ticket band
synthetic_components: Two-Rohit ambiguity + urgency cue (Hinglish) crafted as disambiguation edge case
scenario_008_upi_send_rohit_jaldi.judge_soundbite: Disambiguation under social-pressure cue; baseline TRANSFER from PaySim, ambiguity synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: VPA-lookup / account-discovery capped at 25/user/day by NPCI — confirms it is a real UPI op
Merchant collect requests (kirana/subzi vendor pattern) remain active per NPCI Oct-2025 split
scenario_009_upi_lookup_vpa_subzi.judge_soundbite: Two-step lookup-then-pay matches NPCI's preserved merchant flow; VPA synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: Card-block is a top-5 customer-care op cited in RBI digital-payment fraud guidance
SIM-swap / device-loss is on the NPCI 2025 named fraud-category list
synthetic_components: HDFC chosen as issuer; user phrasing crafted
scenario_010_upi_block_lost_card.judge_soundbite: Card-block under loss/SIM-swap is NPCI-listed fraud category; issuer synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: Disputed-merchant-charge is the single largest UPI complaint sub-category in RBI/NPCI complaint data
INR 1,299 sits in modal food-delivery merchant ticket band
synthetic_components: Zomato chosen as merchant; date and amount synthetic
scenario_011_upi_dispute_zomato.judge_soundbite: Merchant-dispute is the dominant UPI complaint class per RBI FY24-25; values synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: UPI AutoPay mandates are an NPCI-defined product surface; cap-mismatch is a known fraud vector
synthetic_components: Netflix chosen; INR 649 prior amount synthetic
scenario_012_upi_approve_mandate_netflix.judge_soundbite: AutoPay mandate-approval with amount-confirm is the NPCI-mandated UX flow.

distributional_facts_used: Statement / last-N-txn read-op is a standard UPI app surface; not in the capped list
scenario_013_upi_list_last_10_txns.judge_soundbite: Standard read-only statement op; UPI app baseline.

distributional_facts_used: Family-impersonation VPA is a publicly-named NPCI/RBI fraud category (2024-25)
Bank-registered-name mismatch (Jun 2025 NPCI mandate) is the canonical detection signal
TRANSFER-type, mid-amount fraud structure (PaySim fraud distribution)
synthetic_components: INR 5,000 amount close to RBI per-case mean of INR 8,100
scenario_006_adv_upi_fraud_vpa_familiar_.judge_soundbite: Family-impersonation pattern from RBI Annual Report 2024-25 + NPCI name-display mandate; values synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: PaySim isFlaggedFraud >200,000 threshold mirrors NPCI per-txn caps
Property-advance / urgent-registry social-engineering script is on NPCI named-vector list
synthetic_components: INR 1.5 lakh amount, broker context synthetic
scenario_007_adv_upi_mandate_cap_exceede.judge_soundbite: Per-txn cap breach is PaySim isFlaggedFraud heuristic + NPCI cap policy; scenario synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: Lookalike-merchant VPA is on NPCI 2025 named fraud-category list
Time-pressure (10-min offer) is documented vishing/social-engineering primer
scenario_008_adv_upi_imposter_merchant_l.judge_soundbite: Lookalike-merchant VPA category from NPCI 2025 alerts; handle synthetic.

distributional_facts_used: Fake-refund / reversal-of-mistaken-credit is the named scam that drove NPCI to discontinue P2P collect 1-Oct-2025
Detection signal: no inbound credit exists in transactions (matches our state)
scenario_009_adv_upi_refund_reversal_sca.judge_soundbite: Exact scam category that triggered the NPCI Oct-2025 P2P-collect shutdown.

distributional_facts_used: VPA syntactic validation is part of UPI spec; double-@ is a malformed-handle adversarial probe
synthetic_components: priya@@hdfcbank crafted as adversarial input — not a documented in-the-wild distribution
scenario_010_adv_upi_invalid_vpa_typo.judge_soundbite: Adversarial input-validation edge case beyond observed distribution.

anchor_split.note: Above target on REAL_ANCHORED — UPI scenario set is well-grounded in cited public sources.
